The '''''Rampart''''' was an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="EaW" /> By the time of the [[Thrawn campaign]], the ''Rampart'' was assigned to the [[Chazwa system/Legends|Chazwa system]] to reduce smuggling in the area.<ref name="TLCSb">''[[The Last Command Sourcebook]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''

*<!-- 1994-03-XX -->''[[The Last Command Sourcebook]]'' {{1stm}}
